FindTaxReportByPeriodV1Request.description:
Public REST API v1 — POST /v1/tax_reports/find-by-period.

Resolves the MOST RECENT generation of a period (latest-wins). The
FormRequest validates ONLY the parseable shape (`year` integer, `quarter`
integer 1-4, `type` enum) and delegates the period business rules to the
Domain (consistent with the 303/347 generation endpoints):
 - year range (`TaxPeriod::guardYear` via the Query handler) → 422
   `invalid_period.year_out_of_range` (param `year`),
 - cross-field BR-TXR-001 "303 requires quarter" / "347 does not allow quarter"
   (`TaxReportType::assertPeriodMatches()`) → 422
   `invalid_period.quarter_required_for_303` /
   `invalid_period.quarter_not_allowed_for_347`.

We accept `303` / `347` as aliases of the canonical values
`modelo_303` / `modelo_347` (consistent with the paths
`POST /v1/tax_reports/303` and `POST /v1/tax_reports/347`).
`prepareForValidation` normalizes the alias before validating the enum.
FindTaxReportByPeriodV1Request.title: FindTaxReportByPeriodV1Request

GenerateModelo130V1Request.description:
Public REST API v1 — POST /v1/tax_reports/130.

Modelo 130 (IRPF, pago fraccionado, estimación directa). `format` defaults
to `pdf` when omitted (consistent with the 303 endpoint, F-078). Allowed
values: `txt_aeat`, `pdf`, `excel`. Only `txt_aeat` is directly submittable
on the AEAT portal.

The FormRequest validates ONLY the parseable shape of `year` / `quarter`
(integers) and delegates the period business rules to the Domain:
 - year range (`TaxPeriod::guardYear`) → 422 `invalid_period.year_out_of_range`,
 - quarter range (`TaxPeriod::guardQuarter`) → 422 `invalid_period.quarter_out_of_range`,
 - cross-field "130 requires quarter" (`TaxReportType::assertPeriodMatches`)
   → 422 `invalid_period.quarter_required_for_130`.

`quarter` is `nullable` here so the Controller can distinguish "not provided"
(null) from "out of range" — `$request->integer()` would collapse both to 0.

`format` IS validated here with `in:` because `ReportFormat::from()` throws
a native `\ValueError` (not `PublicApiMappable`) on a non-enumerable value
like `docx`: intercepting it in the FormRequest guarantees a 422
`invalid_request_error` (param `format`) instead of a 500.
GenerateModelo130V1Request.title: GenerateModelo130V1Request

GenerateModelo303V1Request.description:
Public REST API v1 — POST /v1/tax_reports/303.

F-078: `format` now defaults to `pdf` when omitted. Previously it was
required without being documented and returned 422, confusing integrators.
Allowed values: `txt_aeat`, `pdf`, `excel`. Only `txt_aeat` is
directly submittable on the AEAT portal.

The FormRequest validates ONLY the parseable shape of `year` / `quarter`
(integers) and delegates the period business rules to the Domain:
 - year range (`TaxPeriod::guardYear`) → 422 `invalid_period.year_out_of_range`,
 - quarter range (`TaxPeriod::guardQuarter`) → 422 `invalid_period.quarter_out_of_range`,
 - cross-field BR-TXR-001 "303 requires quarter"
   (`TaxReportType::assertPeriodMatches`) → 422
   `invalid_period.quarter_required_for_303`.

`format` IS validated here with `in:` because `ReportFormat::from()` throws
a native `\ValueError` (not `PublicApiMappable`) on a non-enumerable value
like `docx`: intercepting it in the FormRequest guarantees a 422
`invalid_request_error` (param `format`) instead of a 500.
GenerateModelo303V1Request.title: GenerateModelo303V1Request

GenerateModelo347V1Request.description:
Public REST API v1 — POST /v1/tax_reports/347.

F-078: `format` now defaults to `pdf` when omitted.
Allowed values: `txt_aeat`, `pdf`, `excel`.

The FormRequest validates ONLY the parseable shape of `year` / `quarter`
(integers) and delegates the period business rules to the Domain:
 - year range (`TaxPeriod::guardYear`) → 422 `invalid_period.year_out_of_range`,
 - cross-field BR-TXR-001 "347 does not allow quarter"
   (`TaxReportType::assertPeriodMatches`) → 422
   `invalid_period.quarter_not_allowed_for_347`.

We accept `quarter` as a nullable integer so that, if the integrator
sends it by mistake, the Domain emits the canonical code instead of
silently ignoring it. `format` IS validated here with `in:` (as in /303)
so that a non-enumerable value like `docx` yields 422 and not a 500 from
the `\ValueError` of `ReportFormat::from()`.
GenerateModelo347V1Request.title: GenerateModelo347V1Request

Invoice.description: A sales invoice (compliant with Spanish AEAT VeriFactu).

number.description: Definitive invoice number, or `null` for drafts (where `is_number_assigned` is `false`).

is_number_assigned.description: Whether the invoice has a definitive number assigned. `false` for drafts (where `number` is `null`); becomes `true` after `POST /v1/invoices/{uuid}/assign-real-number`, or automatically on send/payment.

type.description: AEAT invoice type code: `F1` (ordinaria), `F2` (simplificada), `F3` (sustitutiva de simplificadas), `R1`–`R5` (rectificativa).

external_id.description: External integration key (ERP/CRM/e-commerce) mapping this document to a record in a third-party system. Free-format, unique per company, filterable via `?external_id=`. `null` when not set. Persistent synchronization key, independent of the request-level `Idempotency-Key`.

tags.description: Free classification tags (lowercase slugs `[a-z0-9-]`, ≤ 40 chars each, ≤ 30 tags). Filterable via `?tags[in]=tag1,tag2` (JSON_CONTAINS, OR semantics). Empty `[]` when there are none.

custom_fields.description: Ordered list of typed custom fields `[{field, value}]` (≤ 50). Distinct from `metadata` (a free key→value map): use `custom_fields` for structured, display-oriented integration metadata. Empty `[]` when there are none.

exclude_347.description: Read-only flag (BR-TXR-024): whether this invoice is excluded from the annual Modelo 347 report. The public API cannot mutate it (the create/update FormRequest does not accept it); managing the flag is exclusive to the internal app.

verifactu_status.description: Status of the AEAT VeriFactu submission.

paid_amount.description: Amount already collected for this invoice (derived from the payment ledger). Satisfies the invariant `paid_amount + pending_amount === total`.

pending_amount.description: Outstanding balance pending collection for this invoice (derived from the payment ledger).

payments.description: Payment ledger summary, ALWAYS present (never `null`). `total` mirrors `paid_amount`, `pending` mirrors `pending_amount`. `detail` lists the individual payments and is materialized ONLY on the show endpoint (`GET /v1/invoices/{id}`); in list responses `detail` is `[]` (by cost) while `total`/`pending` stay populated. The detail is also available via `GET /v1/invoices/{id}/payments`.

detail.description: List of individual payments. Empty `[]` in list responses or when there are no payments yet.

is_corrective.description: Whether this invoice is a corrective (rectificativa) of another invoice.

Invoice.title: Invoice

InvoiceActivity.description: An event in the activity timeline of an invoice. Groups domain events originated by changes to the invoice itself (creation, sending, payment, correction, etc.).

event_type.description: Tipo de evento de dominio (p. ej. `invoice.created`, `invoice.paid`).

description.description: Human-readable description of the event in Spanish.
description.example: La factura se marcó como cobrada por transferencia bancaria.
examples: La factura se marcó como cobrada por transferencia bancaria.

metadata.description: Metadatos del evento. Los identificadores internos (PKs) se eliminan; los `*_uuid` se conservan.

type.description: Type of actor that originated the event: `user` for a human in the internal app, `api_key` for an action performed through the public v1 API.

id.description: UUID (v7) of the actor: the user when `type=user`, or the API key when `type=api_key`.

name.description: Nombre del actor en el momento del evento: nombre del usuario o nombre de la API key. `null` si no se pudo resolver.

performed_by.description: Actor that originated the event. `{type:"user",...}` for an internal user, `{type:"api_key",...}` when performed via the public v1 API, or `null` when the event is system-generated (scheduler, periodic sweep) with no attributable actor.

InvoiceActivity.title: InvoiceActivity

InvoiceCorrective.description: Correction data of a corrective invoice. Present (object) when `is_corrective=true`, `null` on ordinary invoices.

original_id.description: UUID (v7) de la factura original rectificada.

original_number.description: Human-readable number of the original corrected invoice.

original_date.description: Issue date of the original invoice (YYYY-MM-DD).

correction_reason.description: Reason for the correction (AEAT code R1–R5).

correction_nature.description: Nature of the correction (`S` substitutive / `I` by differences).

correction_aeat_type.description: AEAT corrective invoice type code (`R1`–`R5`) frozen at issuance from the VeriFactu record. `null` if not resolved.

InvoiceCorrective.title: InvoiceCorrective

InvoiceLine.description: A line item on an invoice.

description.example: Servicio de consultoría enero 2026

InvoiceLine.title: InvoiceLine

InvoicePayment.description: Datos del cobro de la factura. Presente (objeto) cuando `status` es `paid`, `null` en otro caso.

method.description: Payment method (backing value of the Shared enum `PaymentMethod`, e.g. `bank_transfer`).

reference.description: Referencia del cobro (e.g. nº de transferencia).

InvoicePayment.title: InvoicePayment

InvoicePaymentDetail.description: A single payment recorded against an invoice (partial payment ledger entry). Listed in `payments.detail[]` (materialized only on the show endpoint) and in the standalone sub-resource `GET /v1/invoices/{id}/payments`.

id.description: UUID (v7) opaco del pago.

object.description: String que identifica el tipo de objeto. Siempre `payment`.

invoice_id.description: UUID (v7) of the invoice this payment belongs to.

payment_method.description: Payment method (backing value of the Shared enum `PaymentMethod`, e.g. `bank_transfer`).

payment_method_text.description: Human-readable label of the payment method (Spanish).

reference.description: Referencia/número de operación del pago. `null` si no se informó.

notes.description: Notas internas del pago. `null` si no se informaron.

created_at.description: When the payment was recorded (ISO 8601), or `null`.

updated_at.description: When the payment was last updated (ISO 8601), or `null`.

InvoicePaymentDetail.title: InvoicePaymentDetail

InvoiceRecurring.description: Reference to the recurring invoice (template) that generated this invoice. `null` when the invoice does not come from a recurrence.

id.description: UUID (v7) de la factura recurrente parent.

InvoiceRecurring.title: InvoiceRecurring

InvoiceReminderPreview.description: Preview of the payment reminder email (subject + HTML + resolved recipients) without sending it. Useful to show exactly what would be sent before triggering `POST .../send-reminder`.

html.example: <!DOCTYPE html><html lang="es"><head>...</head><body>... Recordatorio de pago. Factura F-2026-015 ... Importe total 1.802,90 € ... Fecha de vencimiento 03/05/2026 ...</body></html>
examples: <!DOCTYPE html><html lang="es"><head>...</head><body>... Recordatorio de pago. Factura F-2026-015 ... Importe total 1.802,90 € ... Fecha de vencimiento 03/05/2026 ...</body></html>

cc.description: Carbon copy addresses. Empty `[]` when there are none.

bcc.description: Blind carbon copy addresses. Empty `[]` when there are none.

status.description: Estado actual de la factura (p. ej. `sent`, `overdue`).

due_date.description: Fecha de vencimiento (YYYY-MM-DD), o `null` si no aplica.

public_url.description: Public link to the invoice, or `null` if the link is not active.

public_link_active.description: Indicates whether the public link is active.

public_link_expires_at.description: When the public link expires (ISO 8601), or `null`.

reminders_sent.description: Number of reminders already sent for this invoice.

last_reminder_sent_at.description: When the last reminder was sent (ISO 8601), or `null` if none has been sent.

cooldown_active.description: Indicates whether there is an active cooldown period that prevents sending another reminder yet.

InvoiceReminderPreview.title: InvoiceReminderPreview

InvoiceReminderSent.description: Acknowledgement of sending a payment reminder.

id.description: UUID (v7) of the invoice the reminder was sent to.

InvoiceReminderSent.title: InvoiceReminderSent

InvoiceStats.description: Aggregated invoicing metrics (KPIs) for the queried period.

total_count.description: Total number of invoices in the period.

by_status.description: Invoice count by status (key = status, value = number of invoices).

revenue_total.description: Total amount invoiced in the period.

overdue_count.description: Number of overdue and unpaid invoices.

average_payment_days.description: Average number of days until payment of paid invoices. `null` if there are no paid invoices in the period.

corrective_count.description: Number of corrective invoices issued in the period.

from.description: Start of the period (YYYY-MM-DD), or `null` if not filtered.

to.description: End of the period (YYYY-MM-DD), or `null` if not filtered.

InvoiceStats.title: InvoiceStats

InvoiceStatusItem.description: Invoice status from the closed catalog with its label and color for UI.

color.description: Color sugerido para pintar el estado en UI.

InvoiceStatusItem.title: InvoiceStatusItem

InvoiceSubstitutedBy.description: Reference to the full invoice (F3) that replaced this simplified invoice (F2). `null` when not applicable.

id.description: UUID (v7) de la factura completa sustituta.

number.description: Human-readable number of the replacement full invoice.

InvoiceSubstitutedBy.title: InvoiceSubstitutedBy

Metadata.description: A free map of up to 50 key→value pairs for storing arbitrary structured data (values are strings up to 500 characters). This is DISTINCT from `custom_fields`: `metadata` is an UNORDERED key→value map for opaque integration data, while `custom_fields` (on the six document resources) is an ORDERED list of typed `{field, value}` pairs with display semantics. A document may carry both. The master resources (Client, Supplier) have no typed `custom_fields`: use their `metadata` as the untyped custom-fields store.
Metadata.title: Metadata

Money.description: Monetary amount as a string with two decimal places (Stripe-style). NOTE: some legacy resources currently emit floats; see harden-public-api-v1-pre-ga.
Money.title: Money

PaginatedList.description: Cursor-paginated list envelope shared by every v1 listing endpoint. `data` holds the page items; `has_more` signals whether another page exists; `next_cursor` is the opaque cursor (UUID v7) to pass as `?cursor=` for the following page. The cursor is opaque — clients MUST NOT interpret it. Concrete listings narrow `data` to their resource type via `allOf`.

has_more.description: Whether more pages are available after this one.

next_cursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page (UUID v7), or `null` when `has_more` is `false`.

PaginatedList.title: PaginatedList

PaymentPreferences.description: Client payment preferences: preferred method and payment term in days.

method.description: Preferred payment method. If `direct_debit` or `sepa_direct_debit`, the client must have at least one bank account marked as default.

terms_days.description: Payment term in days (Net X). Valid range: 0-365.

PaymentPreferences.title: PaymentPreferences

PreviewTaxReportV1Request.description:
Public REST API v1 — POST /v1/tax_reports/preview.

Computes the report breakdown without persisting any generation or file.
Useful for showing the user what they are about to declare before confirming.

We accept `303` / `347` as aliases of the canonical values
`modelo_303` / `modelo_347`, keeping consistency with the paths
`POST /v1/tax_reports/303` and `POST /v1/tax_reports/347`. The handler
normalizes the value before instantiating the VO `TaxReportType`.
PreviewTaxReportV1Request.title: PreviewTaxReportV1Request

index.description: Position of the image in the gallery (0-based).

video.description: Product attached video, or `null` if there is none.

description.example: Teclado mecánico retroiluminado RGB con switches Cherry MX Red y carcasa de aluminio.
examples: Teclado mecánico retroiluminado RGB con switches Cherry MX Red y carcasa de aluminio.

tags.description: Product classification tags.

low_stock_threshold.description: Umbral a partir del cual el stock se considera bajo, o `null` si no configurado.

is_low_stock.description: Indicates whether the current stock is below the configured threshold.

specifications.description: Structured technical specifications of the product (free key-value pairs). Empty object `{}` when there are no specifications.

external_id.description: External integration key (ERP/CRM/e-commerce) mapping this product to a record in a third-party system. Free-format, unique per company, orthogonal to the catalog `sku` (a product may have both, neither, or either).

ProductActivity.description: An event in the activity timeline of a product. Groups domain events originated by changes to the product itself and by documents whose lines reference it (invoices, quotes, etc.).

event_type.description: Tipo de evento de dominio (p. ej. `product.updated`, `invoice.created`).

description.description: Human-readable description of the event in Spanish.
description.example: Se actualizó el precio base del producto.
examples: Se actualizó el precio base del producto.

metadata.description: Metadatos del evento. Los identificadores internos (PKs) se eliminan; los `*_uuid` se conservan.

type.description: Type of actor that originated the event: `user` for a human in the internal app, `api_key` for an action performed through the public v1 API.

id.description: UUID (v7) of the actor: the user when `type=user`, or the API key when `type=api_key`.

name.description: Nombre del actor en el momento del evento: nombre del usuario o nombre de la API key. `null` si no se pudo resolver.

performed_by.description: Actor that originated the event. `{type:"user",...}` for an internal user, `{type:"api_key",...}` when performed via the public v1 API, or `null` when the event is system-generated (scheduler, periodic sweep) with no attributable actor.

ProductActivity.title: ProductActivity

ProductStats.description: Aggregated summary of the product catalog of the authenticated company: total, active, out of stock and low stock. Returned by `GET /v1/products/stats`.

total_products.description: Total number of products registered in the company.

low_stock_count.description: Products whose stock is below the configured threshold.

ProductStats.title: ProductStats

Proforma.description: A proforma invoice that can be converted to a final invoice.

status.description: Proforma lifecycle status (draft, accepted, rejected, cancelled, expired, converted).

validity_days.description: Number of validity days of the proforma since its issuance. `null` if not applicable.

reference.description: Free reference of the document (e.g. the customer order number).

converted_to_id.description: UUID (v7) of the invoice this proforma was converted into, if applicable.

converted_invoice_number.description: Human-readable number of the invoice this proforma was converted into (e.g. "F-2026-00042"). `null` if not converted.

taxes_total.description: Importe de impuestos agregado (= total_vat + total_surcharge − total_retention). Usa total_vat/total_retention/total_surcharge para el desglose.

total_vat.description: Sum of the VAT of all lines.

total_retention.description: Sum of the withholding (IRPF) of all lines.

total_surcharge.description: Sum of the equivalence surcharge of all lines.

shipping_cost.description: Additional shipping cost added to the total.

total_with_shipping.description: Final total including the shipping cost (= total + shipping_cost).

payment_method.description: Preferred payment method (backing value of the Shared enum `PaymentMethod`, e.g. `bank_transfer`).

payment_terms_days.description: Payment term in days (Net X). Valid range: 0-365.

delivery_terms.description: Condiciones de entrega en formato libre.
delivery_terms.example: Entrega en 5 dias habiles, portes incluidos
examples: Entrega en 5 dias habiles, portes incluidos

terms_and_conditions.description: Terms and conditions rendered in the proforma PDF.
terms_and_conditions.example: Validez 30 dias. Proforma sin valor fiscal hasta su conversion en factura.
examples: Validez 30 dias. Proforma sin valor fiscal hasta su conversion en factura.

external_id.description: External integration key (ERP/CRM/e-commerce) mapping this document to a record in a third-party system. Free-format, unique per company, filterable via `?external_id=`. `null` when not set. Persistent synchronization key, independent of the request-level `Idempotency-Key`.

tags.description: Free classification tags (lowercase slugs `[a-z0-9-]`, ≤ 40 chars each, ≤ 30 tags). Filterable via `?tags[in]=tag1,tag2` (JSON_CONTAINS, OR semantics). Empty `[]` when there are none.

custom_fields.description: Ordered list of typed custom fields `[{field, value}]` (≤ 50). Distinct from `metadata` (a free key→value map): use `custom_fields` for structured, display-oriented integration metadata. Empty `[]` when there are none.

link_expires_at.description: Expiration date of the shareable public link, or `null` if unlimited.

link_is_active.description: Indicates whether the shareable public link is currently active.

Proforma.title: Proforma

ProformaLine.description: A line item on a proforma.

description.example: Setup inicial

retention_rate.description: IRPF withholding percentage applied to the line (0–100). Default 0. Its amount is already aggregated into `taxes`.

surcharge_rate.description: Equivalence surcharge (recargo de equivalencia) percentage applied to the line (0–100). Default 0. Its amount is already aggregated into `taxes`.

ProformaLine.title: ProformaLine

ProformaStats.description: Aggregated summary of the proformas of the authenticated company: total, accumulated amount, breakdown by status (with count and amount), conversion-to-invoice ratio, those about to expire and average value. Returned by `GET /v1/proformas/stats`.

count.description: Number of proformas in this state.

total.description: Importe acumulado de las proformas en este estado (EUR).

conversion_rate.description: Conversion-to-invoice ratio (converted proformas / total), as a fraction.

expiring_soon.description: Proformas whose `valid_until` date expires in the coming days.

ProformaStats.title: ProformaStats

PublicLink.description: Represents the state of the shareable public link of a document (quote/invoice/proforma/delivery_note). `url` is the absolute URL ready to send to the client; `enabled` indicates whether it is active; `expires_at` the deadline (`null` = unlimited); `max_days` the maximum allowed when extending it.

url.description: Absolute URL of the public link to share with the client.

id.description: UUID (v7) del documento al que apunta el enlace.

enabled.description: Indicates whether the public link is currently active.

expires_at.description: Expiration date/time of the link, or `null` if it does not expire.

max_days.description: Maximum number of days allowed when extending the link validity (business limit).

PublicLink.title: PublicLink

PurchaseInvoice.description: An invoice received from a supplier.

external_invoice_number.description: The number assigned by the supplier on their invoice.

external_id.description: External integration key (ERP/CRM/e-commerce) mapping this document to a record in a third-party system. Free-format, unique per company, filterable via `?external_id=`. `null` when not set. Persistent synchronization key, independent of the request-level `Idempotency-Key`.

internal_code.description: Optional internal code assigned by the company for its own classification.

received_on.description: Reception date of the invoice, or `null`.

total_retention.description: Aggregated IRPF withholding of the lines (Σ retention_amount). Header invariant: `total === subtotal + taxes_total − total_retention`.

paid_amount.description: Amount already paid against this purchase invoice (derived from the payment ledger, BR-PUR-019). Satisfies the invariant `paid_amount + pending_amount === total`.

pending_amount.description: Outstanding balance pending payment for this purchase invoice (derived from the payment ledger).

payment_status.description: Derived payment status (BR-PUR-020), NOT a persisted domain state (the model keeps 4 statuses). `overdue` derives from `pending` + `due_date < today` and prevails in presentation.

payment_terms_days.description: Payment term days agreed with the supplier, or `null`.

bank_account.description: Supplier bank account. Always `null` in this version (accounts live embedded as JSON in `suppliers` without a stable identity). Follow-up `bridge-bank-account-cross-bc-supplier` will expose it as an object once Supplier promotes a read port.

expense_account.description: Cuenta contable de gasto asociada, o `null`.

expense_category_id.description: UUID (v7) of the associated expense category, or `null`.

deductible_percentage.description: Deductible percentage of the input VAT (0–100), or `null` when not set.

operation_class.description: Operation class for the input VAT of Modelo 303 (BR-PUR-018 / BR-TXR-030). Defaults to `corriente`.

exclude_347.description: Declarative per-document flag (BR-TXR-024): whether this purchase invoice is excluded from the annual Modelo 347 report.

is_reverse_charge.description: Indicates whether the invoice is subject to reverse charge.

tags.description: Free classification tags (lowercase slugs `[a-z0-9-]`, ≤ 40 chars each, ≤ 30 tags). Filterable via `?tags[in]=tag1,tag2` (JSON_CONTAINS, OR semantics). Empty `[]` when there are none.

custom_fields.description: Ordered list of typed custom fields `[{field, value}]` (≤ 50). Distinct from `metadata` (a free key→value map): use `custom_fields` for structured, display-oriented integration metadata. Empty `[]` when there are none.

internal_notes.description: Notas internas no visibles para el proveedor, o `null`.
internal_notes.example: Revisar con contabilidad antes del cierre trimestral.
examples: Revisar con contabilidad antes del cierre trimestral.

PurchaseInvoice.title: PurchaseInvoice

PurchaseInvoiceAttachment.description: Fichero adjunto (PDF/imagen) de la factura de compra. `null` cuando no hay adjunto.

download_url.description: URL relativa de descarga del adjunto (`/v1/purchase_invoices/{id}/file`).

PurchaseInvoiceAttachment.title: PurchaseInvoiceAttachment

PurchaseInvoiceLine.description: A line item on a purchase invoice.

description.example: Material oficina pedido Q1

retention_rate.description: IRPF withholding percentage applied to the supplier (0–100). Default 0.

retention_amount.description: Withholding amount of the line (`subtotal * retention_rate / 100`). The line total follows `subtotal + taxes − retention_amount`.

vat_deductible.description: Whether the line VAT is deductible. Informational: it does not change the amount paid.

PurchaseInvoiceLine.title: PurchaseInvoiceLine

PurchaseInvoiceStats.description: Aggregated metrics (KPIs) of the purchase invoices of the authenticated company: total, count by status and accumulated amounts. `overdue` is a derived condition (`pending` + past due date), not a persisted status.

by_status.description: Invoice count by status (key = status, value = number of invoices). Keys: `draft`, `pending`, `paid`, `cancelled` (persisted statuses) plus `overdue` (derived KPI: overdue subset of `pending`).

overdue.description: Number of overdue and unpaid invoices (subset of `pending` with a past due date).

total_amount.description: Importe total acumulado de todas las facturas de compra.

PurchaseInvoiceStats.title: PurchaseInvoiceStats

Public REST API v1 — POST /v1/invoices/quarterly/download-zip
and POST /v1/invoices/quarterly/send-email (shared fields).

The canonical recipient field is `email`. We accept

Quote.description: A sales quote that can be converted to an invoice.

status.description: Quote lifecycle status (draft, sent, accepted, rejected, expired, converted, cancelled).

converted_to_id.description: UUID (v7) of the invoice this quote was converted into, if any.

converted_invoice_number.description: Human-readable number of the invoice this quote was converted into (e.g. "F-2026-00042"). null if not converted.

taxes_total.description: Aggregated tax amount. Use total_vat/total_retention/total_surcharge for breakdown.

total_vat.description: Sum of VAT (IVA) across all lines.

total_retention.description: Sum of withholding (IRPF/retention) across all lines.

total_surcharge.description: Sum of equivalence surcharge (recargo de equivalencia) across all lines.

terms.description: Free-text terms and conditions rendered on the quote PDF.
terms.example: Presupuesto valido durante 30 dias desde la fecha de emision.
examples: Presupuesto valido durante 30 dias desde la fecha de emision.

external_id.description: External integration key (ERP/CRM/e-commerce) mapping this document to a record in a third-party system. Free-format, unique per company, filterable via `?external_id=`. `null` when not set. Persistent synchronization key, independent of the request-level `Idempotency-Key`.

tags.description: Free classification tags (lowercase slugs `[a-z0-9-]`, ≤ 40 chars each, ≤ 30 tags). Filterable via `?tags[in]=tag1,tag2` (JSON_CONTAINS, OR semantics). Empty `[]` when there are none.

custom_fields.description: Ordered list of typed custom fields `[{field, value}]` (≤ 50). Distinct from `metadata` (a free key→value map): use `custom_fields` for structured, display-oriented integration metadata. Empty `[]` when there are none.

link_expires_at.description: Expiry date of the public share link, or null if unlimited.

link_is_active.description: Whether the public share link is currently active.

Quote.title: Quote

QuoteLine.description: A line item on a quote.

description.example: Auditoría inicial

retention_rate.description: IRPF withholding percentage applied to the line (0–100). Default 0. Its amount is already aggregated into `taxes`.

surcharge_rate.description: Equivalence surcharge (recargo de equivalencia) percentage applied to the line (0–100). Default 0. Its amount is already aggregated into `taxes`.

QuoteLine.title: QuoteLine

QuoteStats.description: Resumen agregado de los presupuestos de la empresa autenticada: total, importe acumulado, conteo por estado, expirados y convertidos a factura. Devuelto por `GET /v1/quotes/stats`.

count_by_status.description: Recuento de presupuestos por estado. Claves: `draft`, `sent`, `accepted`, `rejected`, `expired`, `converted`, `cancelled`.

expired_count.description: Quotes whose `valid_until` date has already passed.

QuoteStats.title: QuoteStats

RecurringInvoice.description: A recurring invoice template that auto-generates invoices on a fixed cadence.

status.description: Recurring schedule status (active, paused, completed, cancelled).

description.example: Contrato de soporte y mantenimiento Plan Pro
examples: Contrato de soporte y mantenimiento Plan Pro

notes.description: Notas internas que se trasladan a las facturas generadas.
notes.example: Renovación automática. Facturar el día 1 de cada mes.
examples: Renovación automática. Facturar el día 1 de cada mes.

email_to.description: Recipient of the automatic dispatch of generated invoices. `null` if not configured.

send_automatically.description: If `true`, the generated invoices are automatically emailed to `email_to`.

days_before_due.description: Payment term days (Net X) applied to the due date of each generated invoice.

max_occurrences.description: Maximum number of invoices to generate before completing the recurrence. `null` = no limit.

occurrences_count.description: Number of invoices already generated by this recurrence.

remaining_occurrences.description: Invoices remaining until `max_occurrences` is reached. `null` when there is no limit.

holiday_handling.description: Adjustment policy when the run date falls on a holiday/weekend (e.g. `none`, `next_business_day`, `previous_business_day`).

next_run_at.description: When the next invoice will be generated.

last_run_at.description: When the last invoice was generated, if any.

cancelled_at.description: When the recurrence was cancelled (irreversible terminal state). `null` if not cancelled.

external_id.description: External integration key (ERP/CRM/e-commerce) mapping this document to a record in a third-party system. Free-format, unique per company, filterable via `?external_id=`. `null` when not set. Persistent synchronization key, independent of the request-level `Idempotency-Key`.

tags.description: Free classification tags (lowercase slugs `[a-z0-9-]`, ≤ 40 chars each, ≤ 30 tags). Filterable via `?tags[in]=tag1,tag2` (JSON_CONTAINS, OR semantics). Empty `[]` when there are none.

custom_fields.description: Ordered list of typed custom fields `[{field, value}]` (≤ 50). Distinct from `metadata` (a free key→value map): use `custom_fields` for structured, display-oriented integration metadata. Empty `[]` when there are none.

RecurringInvoice.title: RecurringInvoice

RecurringInvoiceActivity.description: An event in the activity timeline of a recurring invoice. Groups domain events originated by changes to the recurrence itself (creation, activation, pause, resume, execution, failure, cancellation) and by the invoices it generates.

event_type.description: Tipo de evento de dominio (p. ej. `recurring_invoice.activated`, `recurring_invoice.executed`, `recurring_invoice.cancelled`).

description.description: Human-readable description of the event in Spanish.
description.example: Se generó la factura F-2026-0042 a partir de la recurrencia.
examples: Se generó la factura F-2026-0042 a partir de la recurrencia.

metadata.description: Metadatos del evento. Los identificadores internos (PKs) se eliminan; los `*_uuid` se conservan.

type.description: Type of actor that originated the event: `user` for a human in the internal app, `api_key` for an action performed through the public v1 API.

id.description: UUID (v7) of the actor: the user when `type=user`, or the API key when `type=api_key`.

name.description: Nombre del actor en el momento del evento: nombre del usuario o nombre de la API key. `null` si no se pudo resolver.

performed_by.description: Actor that originated the event. `{type:"user",...}` for an internal user, `{type:"api_key",...}` when performed via the public v1 API, or `null` when the event is system-generated (scheduler, periodic sweep) with no attributable actor.

RecurringInvoiceActivity.title: RecurringInvoiceActivity

RecurringInvoiceLine.description: A line item on a recurring invoice template.

description.example: Cuota soporte mensual

retention.description: IRPF withholding percentage applied to the line (0–100). Default 0. Its amount is already aggregated into `taxes`.

surcharge.description: Equivalence surcharge (recargo de equivalencia) percentage applied to the line (0–100). Default 0. Its amount is already aggregated into `taxes`.

RecurringInvoiceLine.title: RecurringInvoiceLine

RecurringInvoiceStats.description: Aggregated summary of the recurring invoices of the authenticated company: counters by status, upcoming due dates, current-month generation/failures, breakdown by frequency, upcoming runs and estimated revenue. Returned by `GET /v1/recurring_invoices/stats`.

completed.description: Recurrencias completadas (alcanzaron `max_occurrences`). Reportado como `0` hasta que el repositorio provea el conteo dedicado.

due_today.description: Recurrences whose next run is today.

due_this_week.description: Recurrences whose next run falls in the current week.

generated_this_month.description: Facturas generadas por recurrencias durante el mes en curso.

failed_this_month.description: Ejecuciones de recurrencia fallidas durante el mes en curso.

frequency_breakdown.description: Recuento de recurrencias por frecuencia. Claves: `weekly`, `monthly`, `quarterly`, `yearly`, etc.

next_scheduled.description: Upcoming recurrences to run, ordered by run date ascending.

id.description: UUID (v7) de la recurrencia.

estimated_revenue_this_month.description: Ingresos estimados por recurrencias durante el mes en curso (EUR).

RecurringInvoiceStats.title: RecurringInvoiceStats

RegisterInvoicePaymentRequest.description:
Public REST API v1 — POST /v1/invoices/{uuid}/payments.

Registra un pago parcial de una factura de venta reutilizando
`CreatePaymentCommand` del BC Payment. Body:
 - `amount` (numérico > 0, requerido)
 - `paid_on` (fecha, requerido) → mapea al `date` del comando
 - `payment_method` (string del catálogo cerrado `PaymentMethod`, requerido)
   → mapea al `method` del comando
 - `reference` (string, opcional)
 - `notes` (string, opcional)

El `in:` de `payment_method` deriva de `PaymentMethod::cases()` (9 casos:
`bank_transfer`, `direct_debit`, `sepa_direct_debit`, `cash`, `credit_card`,
`check`, `paypal`, `bizum`, `other`) — NO se hardcodea la lista para no
divergir del catálogo. El `CreatePaymentRequest` SPA acepta el mismo conjunto
salvo `direct_debit` (legacy, sustituido por `sepa_direct_debit`).
RegisterInvoicePaymentRequest.title: RegisterInvoicePaymentRequest

RegisterPurchaseInvoicePaymentRequest.description:
Public REST API v1 — POST /v1/purchase_invoices/{uuid}/payments.

Registra un pago parcial (o total) en el ledger de una factura de compra
(BR-PUR-019), reutilizando `RegisterPurchaseInvoicePaymentCommand` del BC
PurchaseInvoice. Body:
 - `amount` (numérico > 0, requerido)
 - `paid_on` (fecha, requerido) → mapea al `paidOn` del comando
 - `payment_method` (string del catálogo `PaymentMethod`, requerido) → `method`
 - `bank_account_id` (entero, opcional)
 - `reference` (string, opcional)
 - `notes` (string, opcional)

Las invariantes de dominio (`0 < amount ≤ pending`, `emisión ≤ paid_on ≤ hoy`,
no sobre `cancelled`) las valida el Aggregate (`registerPayment()`) y se
exponen como 422 vía `InvalidPurchaseInvoicePaymentException` (PublicApiMappable).
RegisterPurchaseInvoicePaymentRequest.title: RegisterPurchaseInvoicePaymentRequest

RejectProformaRequest.description:
Public REST API v1 — POST /v1/proformas/{uuid}/reject.

Body opcional: `reason` (string ≤500), `metadata` (objeto ≤50 keys,
≤500 chars/valor — validado con el VO `Metadata`).
RejectProformaRequest.title: RejectProformaRequest

RejectQuoteRequest.description:
Public REST API v1 — POST /v1/quotes/{uuid}/reject.

Body opcional: `reason` (string).
RejectQuoteRequest.title: RejectQuoteRequest

SendDeliveryNoteRequest.description:
Public REST API v1 — POST /v1/delivery_notes/{uuid}/send.

Required body: `email`. Optional: `subject`, `message` (max 2000 chars),
`template_id` (catalog id of the email template).

`template_id` is the integer identifier of the global system table
`templates` (shared catalog, without `company_id` or `uuid` column). It is
validated against the PK `id`, like the internal SPA endpoint. That is why
it does NOT follow the public UUID convention of the other FKs.

template_id.description:
uuid-audit-allow: global system catalog (`templates` table without
company_id or uuid column; integer catalog PK, like the internal SPA).

SendDeliveryNoteRequest.title: SendDeliveryNoteRequest

SendInvoiceReminderV1Request.description:
Public REST API v1 — POST /v1/invoices/{uuid}/send-reminder
and POST /v1/invoices/{uuid}/reminder-preview (same fields).

All fields are optional — without overrides the handler uses the
canonical payment reminder template.
SendInvoiceReminderV1Request.title: SendInvoiceReminderV1Request

SendInvoiceRequest.description:
Public REST API v1 — POST /v1/invoices/{uuid}/send.

Optional body: `to` (string), `cc[]`, `bcc[]` (arrays of emails),
`subject` (max 200), `body` (string). The controller performs the
cross-field validation: if the client has no email and `to` is
absent, it returns 422 `missing_required_param`.

absent, it returns 422 `missing_required_param`.

Public REST API v1 — POST /v1/quotes/{uuid}/send.

Optional body: `to` (string), `cc[]`, `bcc[]` (arrays of emails),
`subject` (max 200), `body` (string). The controller performs the
cross-field validation: if the client has no email and `to` is
absent, it returns 422 `missing_required_param`.

Series.description: A document numbering series. Immutable per AEAT compliance.

prefix.description: Legacy alias for code. Use code field. Will be removed in v2.

number_format.description: Canonical numbering mask describing how the document number is rendered: padding (the block of zeros), year token (`{YYYY}` 4 digits / `{YY}` 2 digits / omitted for no year) and separator. Example: `{code}-{YYYY}-{000}` (default) or `{code}-{YYYY}-{00000}` for 5-digit padding. Set on creation and immutable afterwards. Mirrors Holded's `format`.

next_number.description: Next correlative that will be assigned on the next real emission.

current_number.description: Last correlative actually emitted in the current fiscal year (0 for a brand-new series).

initial_number.description: Number the counter starts from. Set on creation to continue an existing numbering when migrating (e.g. 235). Defaults to 1.

Series.title: Series

SeriesActivity.description: An event in the activity timeline of a numbering series. Groups domain events originated by changes to the series itself (creation, archive/unarchive, marked as default, number consumption).

event_type.description: Tipo de evento de dominio (p. ej. `series.created`, `series.archived`, `series.number_consumed`).

description.description: Human-readable description of the event in Spanish.
description.example: Serie creada

metadata.description: Metadatos del evento. Los identificadores internos (PKs) se eliminan; los `*_uuid` se conservan.

type.description: Type of actor that originated the event: `user` for a human in the internal app, `api_key` for an action performed through the public v1 API.

id.description: UUID (v7) of the actor: the user when `type=user`, or the API key when `type=api_key`.

name.description: Nombre del actor en el momento del evento: nombre del usuario o nombre de la API key. `null` si no se pudo resolver.

performed_by.description: Actor that originated the event. `{type:"user",...}` for an internal user, `{type:"api_key",...}` when performed via the public v1 API, or `null` when the event is system-generated (scheduler, periodic sweep) with no attributable actor.

SeriesActivity.title: SeriesActivity

SignDeliveryNoteRequest.description:
Public REST API v1 — POST /v1/delivery_notes/{uuid}/sign.

Optional body: `signed_by` (alias of `recipient_name`, BC invariant),
`recipient_dni` (BC invariant — Spanish DNI/NIE, required by
`SignatureData`), `signature_image_base64` (raw base64 PNG; decode +
size + magic bytes are validated by the controller to respond 422
`payload_too_large`/`invalid_param_format`), `signed_at` (ISO 8601
optional, default now).

The controller converts `signed_by` → `recipient_name` and prefixes the
base64 with `data:image/png;base64,` before dispatching to the BC.
SignDeliveryNoteRequest.title: SignDeliveryNoteRequest

SimplifiedInvoiceEligibility.description: Result of checking whether an invoice can be issued as simplified (F2) under RD 1619/2012 art. 4.

can_be_simplified.description: Indica si la factura puede emitirse como simplificada (F2).

must_be_complete.description: Indica si la factura debe emitirse como completa (F1). Es el complemento de `can_be_simplified`.

reason_code.description: Code of the blocking reason when it cannot be simplified (`intra_community`, `reverse_charge`, `export_operation`, `client_deduction_required`, `over_absolute_limit`). Empty string `""` when it can be simplified.

reason_message.description: Human-readable (Spanish) message of the blocking reason. Empty string `""` when it can be simplified.
reason_message.example: El importe 5.000,00 EUR supera el límite de 3.000,00 EUR para una factura simplificada.
examples: El importe 5.000,00 EUR supera el límite de 3.000,00 EUR para una factura simplificada.

sector_limit.description: Absolute legal limit (EUR) above which a simplified invoice is not allowed.

SimplifiedInvoiceEligibility.title: SimplifiedInvoiceEligibility

SimplifiedInvoiceEligibilityV1Request.description:
Public REST API v1 — POST /v1/invoices/simplified-eligibility.

Checks whether an invoice with a given `total` amount (and, optionally,
client data) can be issued as simplified (F2) or must be issued as a
full invoice (F1) under Royal Decree 1619/2012 (art. 4).
SimplifiedInvoiceEligibilityV1Request.title: SimplifiedInvoiceEligibilityV1Request

StripeAutoinvoicedCorrective.description: A corrective invoice automatically generated from a Stripe refund (`charge.refunded`). The public `id` is the UUID (v7) of the corrective invoice; `original_invoice_id` links to the original invoice.

id.description: UUID (v7) of the corrective invoice. Public identity (KEY `id`).

object.description: Stripe-like discriminator. Always `stripe_autoinvoiced_corrective` for this resource.

original_invoice_id.description: UUID (v7) of the original invoice that was corrected by the refund.

refund_id.description: Opaque refund identifier from the payment gateway (e.g. Stripe `re_xxx`).

provider.description: Payment gateway the refund originated from.

amount.description: Refunded amount in euros (the individual refund amount, not the cumulative).

correction_type.description: Scope of the correction: `total` (full annulment) or `partial` (a single negative line for the refunded amount).

created_at.description: When the corrective mapping was recorded (ISO 8601).

StripeAutoinvoicedCorrective.title: StripeAutoinvoicedCorrective

StripeAutoinvoicedPayment.description: A Stripe charge that generated an invoice (one-shot flows A/B and subscription cycles). The public `id` is the UUID (v7) of the payment; `invoice_id`/`client_id` link to the generated invoice and client. Subscription-origin context (`subscription_id`, `stripe_invoice_id`, `period_start`, `period_end`) is `null` for one-shot charges.

id.description: UUID (v7) of the payment record. Public identity (KEY `id`).

object.description: Stripe-like discriminator. Always `stripe_autoinvoiced_payment` for this resource.

invoice_id.description: UUID (v7) of the invoice generated by this charge.

client_id.description: UUID (v7) of the invoice client, or `null` if not available.

stripe_reference.description: Stripe transaction reference of the payment record.

subscription_id.description: External Stripe subscription id (`sub_xxx`) when the charge comes from a subscription cycle; `null` for one-shot charges. This is an external Stripe id, NOT an internal UUID.

stripe_invoice_id.description: Stripe invoice id (`in_xxx`) of the billed cycle; `null` for one-shot charges.

period_start.description: Start of the billed subscription period (YYYY-MM-DD); `null` for one-shot charges.

period_end.description: End of the billed subscription period (YYYY-MM-DD); `null` for one-shot charges.

created_at.description: When the payment record was created (ISO 8601).

updated_at.description: When the payment record was last updated (ISO 8601).

StripeAutoinvoicedPayment.title: StripeAutoinvoicedPayment

StripeAutoinvoicingConfig.description: Stripe Connect integration status and auto-invoicing configuration for your company. Singleton resource (one configuration per company), so it exposes `object` but no navigable `id`.

object.description: Stripe-like discriminator. Always `stripe_autoinvoicing_config` for this resource.

connected.description: Whether the Stripe Connect integration is connected (active) for the company.

enabled.description: Whether auto-invoicing of Stripe charges is enabled. Defaults to `false`.

series_id.description: UUID (v7) of the document series used for auto-created invoices. `null` means the company default series is used.

available_for_current_plan.description: Whether the current plan includes auto-invoicing (effective plan gating, derived from config — not hardcoded).

required_plans.description: Plans that unlock auto-invoicing (derived from config, not hardcoded).

simplified_threshold_cents.description: Simplified invoice (F2) threshold in cents, range `[0, 300000]` (0–3,000 €). Charges without a tax ID at or below this amount are auto-issued as simplified invoices; above it they are routed to manual review. Defaults to 40000 (400 €).

require_nif.description: Whether a Spanish tax ID (NIF) is required for auto-invoicing. When enabled, Factuarea-created Checkouts mark the tax ID as required and charges without a tax ID are never auto-issued as simplified invoices (they go to manual review). Defaults to `false`.

refunds_enabled.description: Whether a Stripe refund (`charge.refunded`) automatically generates a linked corrective invoice (with the original invoice and the VeriFactu R record). Only acts while auto-invoicing is enabled. Defaults to `true`.

subscription_autoinvoicing_enabled.description: Whether Stripe subscription cycles (`invoice.paid` with a standard `billing_reason`) are auto-invoiced. Both this toggle and the general `enabled` flag must be on for a cycle to be invoiced. Defaults to `false`.

StripeAutoinvoicingConfig.title: StripeAutoinvoicingConfig

StripePayout.description: A Stripe payout ingested from `payout.paid`, together with its bank-reconciliation state. The public `id` is the payout UUID (v7). `connected_account_id` (`acct_xxx`) and `stripe_payout_id` (`po_xxx`) are external Stripe ids, not foreign keys. `bank_transaction_ref` is the UUID (v7) of the reconciled bank statement transaction (`null` while `status` is `ingested`). `composition` is the informative breakdown reported by Stripe (component charges + fees), referencing opaque Stripe ids — payouts are read-only on the public API; reconciliation happens in the dashboard.

id.description: UUID (v7) of the payout. Public identity (KEY `id`).

object.description: Stripe-like discriminator. Always `stripe_payout` for this resource.

connected_account_id.description: External Stripe connected account id (`acct_xxx`) the payout was paid out from. NOT an internal UUID nor a foreign key.

stripe_payout_id.description: Opaque Stripe payout identifier (`po_xxx`), unique in Stripe.

amount_net.description: Net amount transferred to the bank account (gross minus fees), in the payout currency.

fee_total.description: Total Stripe fees deducted from the payout.

currency.description: ISO-4217 currency code of the payout.

arrival_date.description: Expected arrival date of the payout in the bank account (YYYY-MM-DD).

status.description: Reconciliation state. `ingested` once persisted; `reconciled` (terminal) once matched against a bank statement transaction.

reconciled_at.description: When the payout was reconciled against the bank statement (ISO 8601), or `null` while `ingested`.

bank_transaction_ref.description: UUID (v7) of the reconciled bank statement transaction, or `null` while `ingested`.

composition.description: Informative breakdown of the payout reported by Stripe (component charges and fees). Component references are opaque Stripe ids (`payment_intent` = `pi_xxx`, `charge_id` = `ch_xxx`), NOT internal payment UUIDs. May be empty when the breakdown could not be read.

billing_emails.description: Additional emails for invoice delivery (administration, accounting). Maximum 5.

iban.description: Legacy alias for bank_accounts[].iban where is_default=true. Se conserva por compatibilidad con integradores existentes; preferir leer `bank_accounts[]` para consumidores nuevos.

preferred_operation_regime.description: Preferred operation regime of the supplier for VAT / VeriFactu purposes.

accumulate_347.description: Whether this supplier accumulates towards the annual Modelo 347 report (operations with third parties above the legal threshold).

external_id.description: External integration key (ERP/CRM/e-commerce) mapping this supplier to a record in a third-party system. Free-format, unique per company, distinct from the fiscal `tax_id`. Persistent ERP synchronization key, independent of the request-level `Idempotency-Key`.

notes.example: Proveedor preferente de material de oficina.
examples: Proveedor preferente de material de oficina.

rate.description: Tipo impositivo aplicado, ej. `21` para IVA 21%.

applies_to.description: Scope where it applies: `sales` (sales only), `purchases` (purchases only), `both` (both).

examples: IVA general aplicable en territorio peninsular y Baleares.

country_aeat_zone.description: Zona AEAT a efectos fiscales: `peninsula` + Baleares, `canarias` (IGIC), `ceuta` (IPSI), `melilla` (IPSI).

UpdateClientRequest.description:
Public REST API v1 — PUT /v1/clients/{uuid}.

Partial PUT update: all fields are `sometimes`. If not sent, the handler
keeps the current value. If sent as `null`, the field is cleared
(when the domain allows it).

Accepts the same fields as `CreateClientRequest` V1 (see docblock there).
The validation of domain invariants (XOR `tax_id`/`alternative_id`,
direct_debit ⇒ default bank account, billing_emails without duplicates) is
performed by the `Client` aggregate. The typed exceptions propagate to the
`ExceptionRenderer` with the canonical v1 envelope.
UpdateClientRequest.title: UpdateClientRequest

UpdateConnectedAccountRequest.description:
Public REST API v1 — PUT /v1/connected-accounts/{account}.

Edita una cuenta Stripe conectada (multi-store, §8.3). TODOS los campos son
OPCIONALES con semántica "no enviado = no tocar" (update parcial): solo se
aplican los campos presentes en el payload, conservando el resto de la config
vigente de la cuenta.

- `name` (string, opcional): nombre editable de la cuenta. `sometimes` → si se
  omite no se toca.
- `series_id` (string UUID v7, opcional/nullable): serie de auto-facturación.
  La KEY pública es `series_id` (valor UUID v7); se valida contra la columna
  `series.uuid` con scope tenant vía `TenantRule::existsByUuid('series')`. Tres
  estados (el controller los traduce al Command):
    · ausente             → NO toca la serie.
    · `series_id: null`   → LIMPIA la serie (vuelve a la serie por defecto de la empresa).
    · `series_id: "<uuid>"` → asigna esa serie (debe existir, tipo factura, del tenant).
- `simplified_threshold_cents` (int, opcional): umbral de factura simplificada
  (F2) en céntimos, rango `[0, 300000]` (0–3.000 €).
- `autoinvoicing_enabled` (bool, opcional): activar/desactivar la auto-facturación.
- `require_nif` (bool, opcional): exigir NIF en la auto-facturación.
- `refunds_enabled` (bool, opcional): rectificativa automática en devoluciones.
- `subscription_autoinvoicing_enabled` (bool, opcional): auto-facturar ciclos de
  suscripción de Stripe.

El controller resuelve `series_id` (UUID v7) → int interno vía
`ResolvesUuidsToIds` antes de despachar el Command.

series_id.description:
Resolver `any`: en v1 REST resuelve el tenant por el
`AuthenticatedApiKeyContext` (presente); en el camino MCP (tools que
sintetizan este FormRequest + `validateResolved()`) cae al usuario
autenticado (`auth_user`) — el contexto de API key no se bindea en el
camino OAuth. Sin `any`, MCP lanzaría `RuntimeException` 500 en vez de
validar `series_id`. El scope tenant (`company_id`) es idéntico en
ambos caminos → mismo aislamiento.

UpdateConnectedAccountRequest.title: UpdateConnectedAccountRequest

UpdateDeliveryNotePublicLinkRequest.description:
Public REST API v1 — PUT /v1/delivery_notes/{uuid}/public-link.

Required body: `action` ∈ {revoke, activate, extend, reset}. `extend_days`
is required when `action=extend`.
UpdateDeliveryNotePublicLinkRequest.title: UpdateDeliveryNotePublicLinkRequest

UpdateDeliveryNoteRequest.description:
Public REST API v1 — PUT /v1/delivery_notes/{uuid}.

Partial update: omitted fields are kept. Only allowed when
the delivery note is in `draft` status (the controller maps the
transition exception to 422 `invalid_status_transition`).

vehicle_plate.description:
Logistics extension (semantic format validated in the Aggregate)
The `required_with` pairing of each duo (driver/carrier/received_by)
is NOT declared here: under `sometimes` the rule is dead when the
dependent field is omitted (Laravel skips ALL its rules). It is applied
in `withValidator()` so that the partial PUT still allows omitting
both fields of the pair, but requires the second when the first is sent.

UpdateDeliveryNoteRequest.title: UpdateDeliveryNoteRequest

UpdateInvoicePublicLinkRequest.description:
Public REST API v1 — PUT /v1/invoices/{uuid}/public-link.

`SchemaName` sets a unique, clean OpenAPI schema name
(`UpdateInvoicePublicLinkRequest`), consistent with Quote/Proforma/DeliveryNote
for the same operation, without renaming the class.
UpdateInvoicePublicLinkRequest.title: UpdateInvoicePublicLinkRequest

UpdateInvoiceRequest.description:
Public REST API v1 — PUT /v1/invoices/{uuid}.

Partial update: omitted fields are kept. Only allowed when
the invoice is in `draft` status (the controller maps the
transition exception to 422 `invalid_status_transition`).
UpdateInvoiceRequest.title: UpdateInvoiceRequest

UpdateProductRequest.description:
Public REST API v1 — PUT /v1/products/{uuid}.

Full update (PUT). All fields `sometimes`: if not sent, the
handler keeps the current value. `sku` unique scoped to the company,
ignoring the product itself. Writable: `name`, `sku`, `price`,
`description`, `tags`, `low_stock_threshold` (per-product),
`currency` (EUR only — Producto is read-only EUR; any other code → 422),
`tax_rate_id`, `is_active`, `metadata`, `external_id`. `stock` is NOT
writable here (D1): stock mutation lives only in
`PUT /v1/products/{uuid}/stock` with its `set`/`increase`/`decrease`
semantics. Validation of `metadata` via VO `Metadata`.

currency.description:
`stock` NO es escribible en el update general (D1): la mutación de
stock vive solo en `PUT /v1/products/{uuid}/stock` (set/increase/
decrease). Exponerlo aquí crearía dos caminos de mutación con
semánticas distintas (replace vs delta) → ambigüedad/doble-conteo.
Producto es read-only EUR: solo se admite `EUR` (o ausencia/null).

tax_rate_id.description:
`taxes` is a global system catalog (without a `company_id` column).
Do NOT use TenantRule here — it would add `WHERE company_id = X` against a
table without that column and cause a 500 (SQLSTATE 42S22). Global
validation by uuid, like in the rest of the BCs (DeliveryNote V1, etc.).

external_id.description:
PUT parcial: `sometimes` (ausente = preservar). La unicidad por
empresa la guarda el controller (409 `external_id_already_exists`)
+ el índice `UNIQUE(company_id, external_id)`. Free-format ≤100.

UpdateProductRequest.title: UpdateProductRequest

UpdateProductStockRequest.description:
Public REST API v1 — PUT /v1/products/{uuid}/stock.

Body: `{ stock: int, operation?: 'set'|'increase'|'decrease' }`.
`operation` defaults to `set` (replace). Accepts also `add` / `subtract`
as aliases for `increase` / `decrease` for ergonomics.
UpdateProductStockRequest.title: UpdateProductStockRequest

UpdateProformaPublicLinkRequest.description:
Public REST API v1 — PUT /v1/proformas/{uuid}/public-link.

`SchemaName` disambiguates the OpenAPI schema: Quote and Proforma declare
structurally identical request bodies, so without a unique name they would
collide in `components.schemas`.
UpdateProformaPublicLinkRequest.title: UpdateProformaPublicLinkRequest

UpdateProformaRequest.description:
Public REST API v1 — PUT /v1/proformas/{uuid}.

Partial update: omitted fields are kept. Only allowed when
the proforma is in `draft` status (the controller maps the
transition exception to 422 `invalid_status_transition`).
UpdateProformaRequest.title: UpdateProformaRequest

UpdatePurchaseInvoiceRequest.description:
Public REST API v1 — PUT /v1/purchase_invoices/{uuid}.

Partial update: omitted fields are kept. Only allowed when the purchase
invoice is in `draft` status. Updating in any later status
(`received`, `pending_payment`, `paid`, `cancelled`) raises
`PurchaseInvoiceCannotBeEditedException` (`PublicApiMappable`), which the
controller lets propagate to the renderer → HTTP **422**
`business_rule_violation` subcode `purchase_invoice_not_editable_in_current_state`
(NOT 409, NOT `invalid_status_transition`: editing outside `draft` is a
business-rule violation, not a state-machine transition).

external_id.description:
Clave de negocio externa (clave de integración ERP/CRM, change
external-id-documents). Partial PUT: `external_id: null` explícito
borra la clave. Ortogonal a `external_invoice_number`.

internal_notes.description:
Extend fields. Basic SHAPE only; the `payment_method` allowlist,
`tax_period` format and `tags` cardinality are validated by the
VO/Aggregate.

custom_fields.description:
custom_fields tipados `[{field,value}]` (§10) — partial PUT con
`sometimes`. `custom_fields: null` explícito vacía la colección.

retention_rate.description:
Retención IRPF e IVA deducible por línea (BR-PUR-022). Mismas reglas
de forma que el create (el cálculo lo hace el VO Shared `Line`).

UpdatePurchaseInvoiceRequest.title: UpdatePurchaseInvoiceRequest

UpdateQuotePublicLinkRequest.description:
Public REST API v1 — PUT /v1/quotes/{uuid}/public-link.

`SchemaName` disambiguates the OpenAPI schema: Quote and Proforma declare
structurally identical request bodies, so without a unique name they would
collide in `components.schemas`.
UpdateQuotePublicLinkRequest.title: UpdateQuotePublicLinkRequest

UpdateQuoteRequest.description:
Public REST API v1 — PUT /v1/quotes/{uuid}.

Partial update: omitted fields are kept. Only allowed when
the quote is in `draft` status (the controller maps the
transition exception to 422 `invalid_status_transition`).
UpdateQuoteRequest.title: UpdateQuoteRequest

UpdateRecurringInvoiceRequest.description:
Public REST API v1 — PUT /v1/recurring_invoices/{uuid}.

Partial update. All fields are optional — those that are
sent overwrite the current value, omitted ones are preserved.

Configurable write fields (parity with create): `client_id`, `series_id`,
`name`, `description`, `frequency`, `holiday_handling`, `start_on`, `end_on`,
`notes`, `metadata`, `days_before_due`, `max_occurrences`, `email_to`,
`send_automatically` and `lines[]` (each line: `description`, `quantity`,
`unit_price`, `tax_rate`, `retention`, `surcharge`).

`frequency` accepts `daily|weekly|biweekly|monthly|quarterly|semiannual|yearly`
(v1 whitelist). `yearly` is mapped to `annual` (internal RecurringInvoice BC)
in the controller.

`holiday_handling` accepts `skip|same|before|after`. The value validation
is performed by the VO `HolidayHandling::create()` in the Handler (throws
`InvalidHolidayHandlingException` → 422 `invalid_holiday_handling`); it is
not duplicated here with an `in:` rule, to preserve the canonical catalog subcode.
UpdateRecurringInvoiceRequest.title: UpdateRecurringInvoiceRequest

UpdateStripeAutoinvoicingConfigRequest.description:
Public REST API v1 — PUT /v1/stripe-autoinvoicing/config.

Actualiza la configuración de auto-facturación de cobros Stripe.

- `enabled` (bool, obligatorio): activar/desactivar la auto-facturación.
- `series_id` (string UUID v7, opcional/nullable): serie a usar para las
  facturas auto-creadas. La KEY pública es `series_id` (valor UUID v7); se
  valida contra la columna `series.uuid` con scope tenant vía
  `TenantRule::existsByUuid('series')` (resolver `context` = API key). Si es
  `null`, las facturas usan la serie por defecto de la empresa.
- `simplified_threshold_cents` (int, opcional): umbral de factura simplificada
  (F2) en céntimos, rango `[0, 300000]` (0–3.000 €). Si se omite, no se toca.
- `require_nif` (bool, opcional): exigir NIF en la auto-facturación (veta la F2
  automática). Si se omite, no se toca.
- `refunds_enabled` (bool, opcional): activar/desactivar la rectificativa
  automática ante una devolución de Stripe (`charge.refunded`). Si se omite, no
  se toca; default `true` cuando la clave no existe en `settings`.
- `subscription_autoinvoicing_enabled` (bool, opcional): activar/desactivar la
  auto-facturación de los ciclos de suscripción de Stripe (`invoice.paid` con
  `billing_reason` estándar). Si se omite, no se toca; default `false` cuando
  la clave no existe en `settings`.

El controller resuelve `series_id` (UUID v7) → int interno vía
`ResolvesUuidsToIds` antes de despachar el Command.
UpdateStripeAutoinvoicingConfigRequest.title: UpdateStripeAutoinvoicingConfigRequest

UpdateSupplierRequest.description:
Public REST API v1 — PUT /v1/suppliers/{uuid}.

Partial PUT update: all fields are `sometimes`. If not sent, the
handler keeps the current value. If sent as `null`, the field is
cleared (when the domain allows it).

Accepts the same fields as `CreateSupplierRequest` V1 (see docblock there).
The validation of domain invariants (XOR `tax_id`/`alternative_id`,
direct_debit ⇒ default bank account, billing_emails without duplicates,
IBAN format, metadata limits) is performed by the `Supplier` aggregate and
the VOs. The typed exceptions propagate to the `ExceptionRenderer` with the
canonical v1 envelope.
UpdateSupplierRequest.title: UpdateSupplierRequest

UpdateTaxRequest.description:
Public REST API v1 — PUT /v1/taxes/{uuid}.

Partial update (PATCH semantics controlled by `*Provided` flags
in the Mapper). Any omitted field is kept; if `null` is sent
explicitly, the value is cleared in the database.

The uniqueness validation of `code` is delegated to the aggregate
(`DuplicateTaxCodeException` → 409). For system taxes,
the non-allowlist fields (`is_active`, `default_for_documents`) throw
`SystemTaxCannotBeMutatedException::forField()` → 422 with
`subcode='system_tax_immutable_field'`.

customer_visible_label.description:
===== EXTEND AEAT/B2B =====
NOTE: no `max:200` rule here. The 200-char limit is enforced by the
VO `CustomerVisibleLabel::create()` via
`InvalidCustomerVisibleLabelException::tooLong(200)` with the canonical
subcode `invalid_customer_visible_label` (spec error catalog §24).

valid_until.description:
NOTE: no `after_or_equal:valid_from` rule here. The invariant
`valid_until >= valid_from` is enforced by the Aggregate via
`InvalidValidityWindowException::endBeforeStart()` with the canonical
subcode `invalid_validity_window` (spec error catalog §6).

UpdateTaxRequest.title: UpdateTaxRequest

UpdateVeriFactuSettingsV1Request.description:
Public REST API v1 — PUT /v1/verifactu/settings.

PARTIAL update of the company's VeriFactu configuration: each field is
optional and is only applied if present in the body (`*Provided` pattern
of `UpdateVeriFactuSettingsV1Command`). The controller resolves
the `*Provided` flag via `$this->has('field')`.

Per-field validation:
 - `enabled: boolean`
 - `mode: in:verifactu,no_verifactu`
 - `auto_transmit: boolean`
 - `environment: in:sandbox,production`
 - `notification_emails: array|max:5`, `notification_emails.*: email`
UpdateVeriFactuSettingsV1Request.title: UpdateVeriFactuSettingsV1Request

UpdateWebhookEndpointRequest.description:
PUT /v1/webhook_endpoints/{uuid}

Partial — all fields optional (`sometimes`). Only the fields present in the
body are updated; absent ones are preserved. To clear an optional field send
an explicit `null` (`{field}Provided=true` + `value=null` semantics).

When present, `enabled_events` follows the same contract as on create: only
`available` events are subscribable, i.e. each element must belong to the
closed active catalog `EventName::CATALOG`. Events in `EventName::RESERVED`
(status `coming_soon`) are listed in `GET /v1/event-catalog` but are NOT yet
emitted, so they are NOT subscribable — sending one yields 422.
UpdateWebhookEndpointRequest.title: UpdateWebhookEndpointRequest

UploadCompanyCertificateV1Request.description:
Public REST API v1 — POST /v1/verifactu/certificates.

Uploads an FNMT certificate (PKCS#12) multipart for the authenticated company.
Fields: `certificate_file` (file) + `certificate_password` (string).

Genuinely new hardening compared to the SPA upload:
 - Extension `.p12`/`.pfx` (`mimes`).
 - Size ≤ 102400 bytes (100 KB) — explicit guard in bytes,
   a generous upper bound for a real FNMT PKCS#12 (typically 4-15 KB).
 - ASN.1 DER/BER magic bytes via the reusable rule
   {@see Pkcs12MagicBytes}: the first 2 bytes MUST be `0x30 0x82`
   or `0x30 0x80`. Defense-in-depth against files that lie about their MIME.

A magic-bytes / size failure throws `InvalidCertificateFormatException`
(Mappable → 422 `business_rule_violation` / `invalid_certificate_format`),
NOT a generic `ValidationException`, so that the canonical V1 envelope is
preserved (subcode `certificate_too_large` for the size limit).

certificate_file.description:
`extensions:` validates the extension declared by the client (p12/pfx) —
`mimes:` fails because the Symfony guesser does not map PKCS#12 from
the content. The real format defense (ASN.1 DER magic bytes) and the
size limit are applied in `withValidator()`, throwing the Mappable
`InvalidCertificateFormatException` to preserve the canonical envelope
(`business_rule_violation`), instead of the generic `invalid_param_value`
that a `$fail()` would produce.

UploadCompanyCertificateV1Request.title: UploadCompanyCertificateV1Request

UploadProductGalleryImageRequest.description:
Public REST API v1 — POST /v1/products/{uuid}/gallery.

Multipart upload: `photo` or `image` (alias) field — jpeg/png/jpg/gif/webp,
max 3 MB.

We accept `image` as an alias of the canonical `photo` field for
forgiveness with integrators that send it following the more intuitive
convention. The controller normalizes it to `photo`.
UploadProductGalleryImageRequest.title: UploadProductGalleryImageRequest

UploadProductVideoRequest.description:
Public REST API v1 — POST /v1/products/{uuid}/video.

Multipart upload: campo `video` (mp4/mov/avi/webm, max 50 MB).
UploadProductVideoRequest.title: UploadProductVideoRequest

VeriFactuActivity.description: An event in the activity timeline of a VeriFactu record (creation, transmission attempts, AEAT acceptance/rejection).

event_type.description: Tipo de evento de dominio (p. ej. `verifactu.record_created`, `verifactu.transmission_accepted`).

description.description: Human-readable description of the event in Spanish.
description.example: AEAT aceptó la transmisión del registro de alta.
examples: AEAT aceptó la transmisión del registro de alta.

metadata.description: Metadatos del evento. Los identificadores internos (PKs), `huella` y secretos de certificado se eliminan; los `*_uuid` se conservan.

type.description: Type of actor that originated the event: `user` for a human in the internal app, `api_key` for an action performed through the public v1 API.

id.description: UUID (v7) of the actor: the user when `type=user`, or the API key when `type=api_key`.

name.description: Nombre del actor en el momento del evento: nombre del usuario o nombre de la API key. `null` si no se pudo resolver.

performed_by.description: Actor that originated the event. `{type:"user",...}` for an internal user, `{type:"api_key",...}` when performed via the public v1 API, or `null` when the event is system-generated (scheduler, periodic sweep) with no attributable actor.

VeriFactuActivity.title: VeriFactuActivity

VeriFactuConfig.description: VeriFactu configuration of your company (mode, environment, enrollment). Returned by `GET /v1/verifactu/config` and `PUT /v1/verifactu/settings`. The certificate password is never exposed.

enabled.description: Indicates whether VeriFactu is enabled for the company.

auto_transmit.description: Indicates whether transmissions to AEAT are sent automatically.

is_locked_until.description: Date until which the mode change is locked (BR-VFC-001), or `null` if not locked.

has_active_certificate.description: Indica si hay un certificado activo configurado.

active_certificate_id.description: UUID (v7) del certificado activo, o `null` si no hay ninguno.

VeriFactuConfig.title: VeriFactuConfig

VeriFactuEvent.description: A VeriFactu SIF event (Art. 8.1.b): a transmission/retry/AEAT-response entry of the system. The hash chain is never exposed here.

id.description: UUID (v7) del evento.

event_data.description: Non-PII descriptive data of the event (label, description, CSV, error code/message). Empty object `{}` when there is no data. Sanitized via MetadataSanitizer.

example.description: Transmisión de alta aceptada por AEAT.

examples.description: Transmisión de alta aceptada por AEAT.

VeriFactuEvent.title: VeriFactuEvent

VeriFactuEventSummary.description: Resumen agregado de los eventos del SIF de la empresa: total y desglose por tipo y por estado. Devuelto por `GET /v1/verifactu/events/summary`.

events_by_status.description: Recuento de eventos por estado AEAT.

last_event_at.description: Date of the last event, or `null` if there is none.

VeriFactuEventSummary.title: VeriFactuEventSummary

VeriFactuRecord.description: A VeriFactu (Spanish AEAT SIF) record (alta/anulación) associated with an invoice. Includes the hash chain (`huella`), AEAT CSV and transmission status for reconciliation.

id.description: UUID (v7) del registro VeriFactu.

invoice_type.description: Tipo de factura AEAT (F1, F2, F3, R1-R5, …).

amount.description: Importe total de la factura asociada.

status.description: Transmission status (pending, submitted, accepted, rejected, error).

huella.description: Huella SHA-256 encadenada del registro (fingerprint VeriFactu).

aeat_submission_id.description: Submission identifier assigned by AEAT (column `aeat_submission_id`). `null` until AEAT returns it. Never the internal PK of the record.

aeat_csv.description: Secure Verification Code (Código Seguro de Verificación) returned by AEAT on acceptance. `null` until AEAT assigns it.

transmitted_at.description: ISO 8601 date of the last transmission that reached AEAT. `null` in PENDING/REJECTED/ERROR states.

is_simplificada.description: Indica si la factura es simplificada (F2).

is_substitute_for_simplified.description: Indica si sustituye a una o varias facturas simplificadas (F3).

VeriFactuRecord.title: VeriFactuRecord

VeriFactuStats.description: Resumen agregado de los registros VeriFactu de la empresa autenticada: conteos por estado y desglose por tipo. Devuelto por `GET /v1/verifactu/stats`.

submitted.description: Records submitted to AEAT (without a final response yet).

by_invoice_type.description: Recuento por tipo de factura AEAT (F1, F2, F3, …).

last_transmission_at.description: Date of the last transmission to AEAT, or `null` if there is none.

VeriFactuStats.title: VeriFactuStats

VerifyClientCensusRequest.description:
Public REST API v1 — POST /v1/clients/census-verification.

Verifies a THIRD PARTY's name + tax_id pair (invoice recipient) against
the AEAT census (VNifV2). Max lengths mirror the Company BC value objects
consumed by the bridge (`TaxIdentifier` ≤ 20, `CompanyName` ≤ 100).

tax_id.description: Spanish tax identifier (NIF/CIF/NIE) of the third party to check against the AEAT census

name.description: Name or business name of the third party (the name + tax ID pair is verified together)

VerifyClientCensusRequest.title: VerifyClientCensusRequest

VoidInvoiceRequest.description:
Public REST API v1 — POST /v1/invoices/{uuid}/void.

Optional body: `reason` (string). If the API client does not send a
reason, a placeholder is persisted ("Anulada via API v1.").
VoidInvoiceRequest.title: VoidInvoiceRequest

WebhookDelivery.description: A single attempt to deliver an event to a webhook endpoint.

status.description: Delivery status. `pending` (queued / in-flight), `delivered` (2xx received), `failed` (recoverable failure, will retry), `failed_permanently` (all attempts exhausted), `cancelled` (delivery aborted, terminal).

signature.description: HMAC SHA-256 signature header value (`t=...,v1=...`) sent with this delivery, for debugging signature verification. `null` for deliveries created before signing or not yet attempted.

request_headers.description: HTTP headers sent with this delivery attempt (debug). Empty object when no headers were captured.

WebhookDelivery.title: WebhookDelivery

WebhookEndpoint.description: An HTTPS endpoint that receives webhook events. The secret is never exposed in this representation.

description.example: Webhook principal de producción.

enabled_events.description: List of event types this endpoint subscribes to.

api_version.description: API version (date-based, e.g. `2026-05-01`) pinned for the payloads delivered to this endpoint. `null` means the account default applies.

timeout_seconds.description: HTTP request timeout in seconds applied when delivering to this endpoint (1–30). `null` means the system default applies.

degraded_since.description: Timestamp since which the endpoint is considered degraded (sustained delivery failures). `null` when healthy.

WebhookEndpoint.title: WebhookEndpoint

WebhookEndpointWithSecret.description: A WebhookEndpoint returned once at creation or after secret rotation. Includes the plain-text signing secret.

description.example: Webhook principal de producción.

enabled_events.description: List of event types this endpoint subscribes to.

api_version.description: API version (date-based, e.g. `2026-05-01`) pinned for the payloads delivered to this endpoint. `null` means the account default applies.

timeout_seconds.description: HTTP request timeout in seconds applied when delivering to this endpoint (1–30). `null` means the system default applies.

degraded_since.description: Timestamp since which the endpoint is considered degraded (sustained delivery failures). `null` when healthy.

secret.description: Signing secret. Returned only at creation or after rotation.

WebhookEndpointWithSecret.title: WebhookEndpointWithSecret

livemode.description: `true` for production events (`fact_live_`); `false` for test-mode events (`fact_test_`).

BadRequest.description: The request is syntactically malformed — e.g. an unknown query parameter, an integer parameter with non-numeric value, or a value outside the documented range.

error.message: El parámetro 'per_page' no está reconocido por este endpoint.
El parámetro 'created' debe seguir el formato ISO-8601 (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ssZ).

parameter_invalid_range.summary: Parameter value is out of range

error.message: El parámetro 'limit' debe estar entre 1 y 100, recibido: 500.

X-Request-Id.description: Unique request identifier, propagated for log correlation and support.

error.message: No se ha proporcionado una API key válida en el header Authorization.
La API key no tiene el formato esperado (debe empezar por fact_live_ o fact_test_).
Esta API key ha sido revocada y ya no es válida.

Forbidden.description: The API key lacks the required scope for this operation.

error.message: Esta API key no tiene el scope requerido para esta operación.
Esta funcionalidad requiere el plan empresario o superior. Actualiza tu suscripción para acceder.
Esta operación requiere un addon que no está activo para tu cuenta.

NotFound.description: The requested resource does not exist or belongs to another company.

error.message: El recurso solicitado no existe o pertenece a otra empresa.

tax_report_not_found.summary: Tax report not found for the period

error.message: No se ha encontrado ninguna declaración generada para el período indicado.

X-Request-Id.description: Unique request identifier, propagated for log correlation and support.

Conflict.description: The request conflicts with the current resource state — e.g. an idempotency key was reused with a different body, or the resource is in a state that does not allow this operation.

idempotency_key_reused.summary: Idempotency key reused with different body

error.message: La cabecera `Idempotency-Key` ya se usó con un body distinto. Usa una clave nueva o reenvía exactamente el mismo body.
Ya existe un cliente con ese CIF/NIF.
El recurso está en un estado que no permite esta operación.

X-Request-Id.description: Unique request identifier, propagated for log correlation and support.

ConflictInvoice.description: The invoice request conflicts with its current state — e.g. an invalid status transition (marking an already-paid invoice as paid), an attempt to edit an issued invoice (use corrective instead), or a reused idempotency key.

idempotency_key_reused.summary: Idempotency key reused with different body

error.message: La cabecera `Idempotency-Key` ya se usó con un body distinto. Usa una clave nueva o reenvía exactamente el mismo body.
El recurso está en un estado que no permite esta operación.

X-Request-Id.description: Unique request identifier, propagated for log correlation and support.

IdempotencyKey.name: Idempotency-Key
IdempotencyKey.description: Unique key generated by the client to ensure idempotency on retries. It lets you safely resend the same request: the first response is cached and returned without re-executing the mutation. It is an **opaque string** to the server; any unique value of up to 64 characters is valid (UUID v7, UUID v4, ULID, nanoid, etc.). UUID v7 is recommended for consistency with the API identifiers. The same key reused with a different body returns `409 idempotency_key_reused`.
